note: Reference implementations target this revision. Revision 2026-06-13 added §21 tasks, §22 interface capabilities, §23 reason-code registry, §24 lifecycle, §25 caching/tracing, and §26 multi-provider on-behalf-of delegation. These additions are ADDITIVE: the five core conformance vectors (canonical-hash, capability-identity, argument-binding, grant-rules, taint) are unchanged and the current SDK/gateway implementations remain conformant. Reference coverage of the new sections (tasks, interface, multi-provider OBO) is being added incrementally.
